name: jvmlens
description: Claude Code skills for driving jvmlens — turn a JFR recording into a compact, source-attributed, LLM-ready CPU/memory/wait summary. One skill for the dev-time optimize→measure loop, one for the long-running monitor + trend.

plugins.name: jvmlens-perf
plugins.description: Drive the dev-time optimize→measure loop with jvmlens: capture a JFR, analyze ranked hot paths + allocation sites (source-attributed), fix the top lever, diff before/after on absolute weight, and optionally gate regressions in CI. Pairs with JMH.

plugins.name: jvmlens-monitor
plugins.description: Drop the jvmlens agent into a JVM to profile it over days: it appends one compact CPU/memory/wait sample per interval, then `jvmlens trend` reduces the run to a change-over-time digest. Also covers one-shot analyze, live profile <pid>, and an MCP server.
